ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_code" INTEGER /* Store code assigned by the company */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the store is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the store is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the store is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the store */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Two-letter country code */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "article_number" INTEGER /* Article number assigned by the company */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applied to the product */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period for the product */,
  "warranty_terms" TEXT /* Warranty terms for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the manufacturer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the manufacturer is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the manufacturer */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the manufacturer is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the supplier is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the supplier is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the supplier is located */,
  "supplier_rating" REAL /* Rating of the supplier */,
  "supplier_reliability" REAL /* Reliability of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_time" TEXT /* Time of the sale */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the sale */,
  "sale_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the sale */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applied to the sale */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost for the sale */,
  "shipping_provider" TEXT /* Shipping provider for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the customer is located */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integration_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration log */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "integration_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the last integration */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integration_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integration_logs_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store the user is associated with */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales report */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the product */,
  "total_quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity of the product sold */,
  "total_tax" REAL /* Total tax amount for the product */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory report */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "total_quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity of the product in stock */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_reports_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_reports_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_health" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system health log */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., CPU usage, memory usage) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time of the log */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time of the system */,
  "throughput" REAL /* Throughput of the system */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Error rate of the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_health_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base product */,
  "parent_variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent variant (if applicable) */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant */,
  "variant_code" TEXT /* Code of the variant */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the variant */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applied to the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_parent_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, refund, deposit) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_time" TEXT /* Time of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_transactions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory movement */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product moved */,
  "movement_date" TEXT /* Date of the movement */,
  "movement_time" TEXT /* Time of the movement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_movements_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_movements_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the employee */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the employee */,
  "work_schedule" TEXT /* Work schedule of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_employees_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)
